Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/webinars.asp?SBDC_WEBINAR_FORMAT=All&SBDC_WEBINAR_TOPIC=Webinars+-+Spanish

# Spanish-Language SBDC Route

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
If the user prefers Spanish, route to Spanish webinars and note Spanish-language advising preference in the handoff. Use simple language and ask whether they prefer the handoff in English or Spanish.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
